calendarFaqs.q: Does Hillsborough County Public Schools have a fall break in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Hillsborough County Public Schools has a fall break running from Nov 24, 2025 to Nov 28, 2025, a total of 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Hillsborough County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Hillsborough County Public Schools runs Mar 16, 2026–Mar 20, 2026, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: Hillsborough replaces a traditional Thanksgiving break with a full Fall Break week — an unusual structure among Florida districts.

yearNumbers.label: Florida State Fair Day
yearNumbers.detail: A designated no-school day coincides with the Florida State Fair — a Tampa-specific tradition unique to Hillsborough County.

yearNumbers.label: Strawberry Festival Day
yearNumbers.detail: A no-school day tied to the Plant City Strawberry Festival, reflecting Hillsborough's agricultural heritage — not found in other Florida district calendars.

calendarNotes: Hillsborough County Public Schools begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 11, 2025. Spring Break runs March 16–20, 2026, the same week as Broward County and Palm Beach County; Miami-Dade breaks a week later (March 23–27). The school year ends May 29, 2026.
